root_query: EGFR kinase WT mutant IC50 Ki Kd experimental inhibitor activity

scientific_papers.name: Moyer et al. 1997 – Erlotinib (CP-358,774) TKI activity against EGFR

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: OCR, regex parsing of text and manual plot analysis

scientific_papers.notes: Historical benchmark for Erlotinib (CP-358,774) against EGFR WT. Data is embedded within body text and dose-response figures.

scientific_papers.name: Lim et al. 2023 – BBT-176 4th-generation TKI for EGFR mutations

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: image table extraction for figures, regex parsing for text

scientific_papers.notes: EGFR inhibitor targeting the C797S resistance mutation. Structured tables in main PDF text.

scientific_papers.name: Schwartz et al. 2014 – Covalent EGFR inhibitor analysis

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: regex parsing of text and pdfplumber table extraction

scientific_papers.notes: Key Pfizer study profiling the double mutant EGFR-L858R/T790M and WT with covalent inhibitors. Contains structured potency values in the main text and tables.

supplementary_materials.name: Schwartz et al. 2014 Supplementary Information

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: Camelot or tabula supplementary table parsing

supplementary_materials.notes: Contains extensive supplemental tables comparing Kd, Ki, and kinetic constants (kinact) of covalent inhibitors and analogs against WT and L858R/T790M EGFR.

databases.name: ChEMBL Database REST API

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: Python script with requests to query target_chembl_id=CHEMBL203

databases.notes: Primary database for automated extraction. Covers wild-type and common mutants, though metadata parsing of mutations is required.

databases.name: PubChem PUG REST API

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: API lookup by assay ID or target text matching

databases.notes: Provides supplementary screening data. High volume of records but metadata is less detailed than ChEMBL.

aggregators.name: BindingDB Target Page
aggregators.access_method: HTML parsing and TSV bulk download

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: web scrape of target HTML or pandas parsing of flat TSV

aggregators.notes: Good for thermodynamic parameters (Kd, Ki) of EGFR inhibitors.
